tools.name: search_tools
tools.description: Tool search_tools

tools.name: get_tool_details
tools.description: Tool get_tool_details

tools.name: get_site_map
tools.description: Get the store's site map for navigation discovery.

tools.name: get_page_content
tools.description: Retrieve content of a specific store page by URL.

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search products across verified merchants with filters by category, price, stock, and trust score.

tools.name: search_products_enriched
tools.description: Search products with enriched data: attributes, variants, GTIN, multiple images.

tools.name: get_product_details
tools.description: Retrieve full product information including price, variants, policies, and merchant trust score.

tools.name: compare_products
tools.description: Side-by-side comparison of 2-5 products with normalized attributes and bestValue recommendation.

tools.name: browse_categories
tools.description: List available product categories for a merchant with product counts.

tools.name: nlweb_ask
tools.description: Natural language product search via NLWeb Discovery Layer. Returns Schema.org Products.

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Search merchant documentation and policy pages.

tools.name: get_merchant_profile
tools.description: Get merchant trust score, verification level, return policies, and shipping SLA.

tools.name: ucp_get_catalog
tools.description: Get real-time product prices and inventory via UCP catalog capability.

tools.name: onx_get_inventory
tools.description: Get current inventory levels per product and location.

tools.name: explore_store
tools.description: Complete agent onboarding — capability matrix, recommended journeys (discovery/shopping/checkout/trust), discovery endpoints, and agent-friendliness score. Call this FIRST on any new store.

tools.name: run_scenario
tools.description: Run an autonomous test scenario (discovery/shopping/checkout/trust/full) and get structured pass/fail results with evidence. Use to verify capabilities before relying on them.

tools.name: get_payment_methods
tools.description: List the payment rails the merchant really accepts, with instruments per rail. Call before checkout to negotiate a settleable rail.

tools.name: get_store_trust
tools.description: Get the store's signed trust score (v4.1, 0-100) with per-signal data quality, confidence level, and a detached JWS for offline verification. Don't trust the number — verify it.

tools.name: onx_get_orders
tools.description: Retrieve orders with filters (status, date, customer).

tools.name: onx_get_returns
tools.description: Retrieve return requests with status, refund, and label URLs.

tools.name: onx_get_fulfillments
tools.description: Get fulfillment records with tracking info for an order.

tools.name: onx_create_return
tools.description: Initiate a return request. Requires human confirmation. Validates return policy window.

tools.name: onx_cancel_order
tools.description: Cancel an unfulfilled order. Requires human confirmation. Triggers refund if captured.

tools.name: enroll_payment_method
tools.description: Enroll a payment method for future agent payments.

tools.name: check_agent_consent
tools.description: Check MCAP agent payment consent status and spending limits.

tools.name: create_cart
tools.description: Create a shopping cart for a merchant. Validates stock and applies fraud detection.

tools.name: attach_agent_identity
tools.description: Attach agent identity attributes to an existing Shopify cart. Use when create_cart was called without agent_token, or to retry after a transient failure.

tools.name: verify_age_over_n
tools.description: Request or poll EUDI Wallet age verification (age_equal_or_over.N) for the buyer.

tools.name: verify_residence_country
tools.description: Request or poll EUDI Wallet residence-country verification for the buyer.

tools.name: verify_legal_person_authorization
tools.description: Request or poll EUDI Wallet verification that the buyer is authorized to act for a legal person.

tools.name: apply_discount
tools.description: Apply a discount code to the cart (TEST*/WELCOME* = 10% off).

tools.name: get_shipping_rates
tools.description: Get shipping rates for a cart. Uses elicitation to collect address.

tools.name: select_shipping_option
tools.description: Select a shipping option and recalculate cart totals.

tools.name: preview_checkout
tools.description: Finalize cart summary and advance to READY_FOR_PAYMENT state.

tools.name: complete_checkout
tools.description: Complete checkout via merchant adapter. Requires human confirmation. Idempotent.

tools.name: create_payment_mandate
tools.description: Create a payment mandate for agent-initiated payments.

tools.name: update_payment_mandate
tools.description: Update an existing payment mandate's limits or scope.

tools.name: cancel_payment_mandate
tools.description: Cancel an active payment mandate.

tools.name: process_agent_payment
tools.description: Process a Mastercard Agent Pay (MCAP) payment with Ed25519 HTTP signatures.

tools.name: complete_visa_payment
tools.description: Complete a Visa Agent Toolkit payment flow.

tools.name: ucp_create_checkout
tools.description: Create a UCP (Universal Commerce Protocol) checkout session from line items.

tools.name: ucp_update_checkout
tools.description: Replace all line items in a UCP checkout session.

tools.name: ucp_add_items_to_checkout
tools.description: Tool ucp_add_items_to_checkout

tools.name: ucp_complete_checkout
tools.description: Tool ucp_complete_checkout

tools.name: ucp_get_checkout
tools.description: Retrieve a UCP checkout session by ID.

tools.name: ucp_cancel_checkout
tools.description: Cancel a UCP checkout session and release held inventory.

tools.name: get_acp_orders
tools.description: Retrieve ACP orders placed via this store. Returns status, items, totals, and tracking links.

tools.name: browse_catalog_feed
tools.description: Browse the full product catalog with optional category filter and pagination (ACP feed capability).
